home.title: Rushel Weds Sivani
home.welcomeText: We are so excited to celebrate this special day with you!

christianEvent.title: Christian Ceremony
christianEvent.description: Join us for a beautiful celebration of marriage with traditional Christian customs.

hinduEvent.title: Hindu Ceremony
hinduEvent.description: Experience a vibrant Hindu wedding ceremony full of color and tradition.

rsvp.title: Will You Join Us?
rsvp.description: Your presence would mean the world to us. Please let us know if you can celebrate this special day with us by submitting your RSVP.

christian.title: Christian Ceremony
christian.headline: Join Us for Our Christian Wedding Ceremony
christian.description: We are so happy to celebrate our wedding with you in Kirche Altendorf – the church in Rushel's hometown, where he grew up. Together with the people we love most, we want to say 'yes' to each other before God.
christian.description2: Having you there to witness our vows would mean so much to us – this is a moment we truly want to share with all of you.

arrival.title: Guest Arrival
arrival.description: Please arrive before the ceremony begins. Doors open from 8:30 AM – find your seats and enjoy the welcoming atmosphere.

begins.title: Processional
begins.description: The ceremony begins as the bride walks down the aisle accompanied by her father, to the sound of the organ.

vows.title: Welcome & Opening Prayer
vows.description: The pastor welcomes all guests and opens the ceremony with a prayer.

pronouncement.title: Scripture Readings & Sermon
pronouncement.description: Bible readings and a heartfelt reflection on love and marriage by the pastor.

recessional.title: Exchange of Vows & Rings
recessional.description: The couple exchange their heartfelt vows and wedding rings before God and all their loved ones.

photos.title: Pronouncement & Recessional
photos.description: Declared husband and wife, the newlyweds exit the church together for the first time as a married couple.

apero.title: Apero
apero.description: Join us outside the church for a celebratory Apero with drinks and light snacks to toast the newlyweds.

hindu.title: Hindu Ceremony
hindu.headline: Celebrate Our Hindu Wedding Ceremony
hindu.description: We warmly invite you to join us for our traditional Hindu wedding ceremony! This vibrant celebration is filled with color, music, and meaningful rituals that bring our two families together.
hindu.description2: Your presence, as we perform our sacred rituals would make this beautiful and auspicious day even more special for us.

baraat.title: Baraat
baraat.description: The groom's procession arrives at the venue.

milni.title: Milni
milni.description: The greeting ceremony between both families.

ganeshPuja.title: Ganesh Puja
ganeshPuja.description: Prayer to Lord Ganesh to remove obstacles.

mandap.title: Mandap Ceremony
mandap.description: The main wedding rituals begin under the mandap.

saptapadi.title: Saptapadi
saptapadi.description: The couple takes seven steps together, making vows.

mangalsutra.title: Mangalsutra
mangalsutra.description: The groom ties the sacred necklace around the bride's neck.

rituals.title: Important Hindu Wedding Rituals
rituals.description: Our Hindu wedding ceremony includes several meaningful rituals from the Tamil (Sri Lankan) tradition, symbolizing our union and the coming together of our families.

manavarai.title: Manavarai (மணவரை)
manavarai.description: The beautifully decorated ceremonial space where the wedding takes place

pennKodukkal.title: Penn Kodukkal (பெண் கொடுக்கல்)
pennKodukkal.description: The symbolic giving away of the bride by her family

agniPradakshinam.title: Agni Pradakshinam (அக்னி பிரதக்ஷிணம்)
agniPradakshinam.description: The couple walks around the sacred fire as part of the ceremony

thaali.title: Thaali Kattudhal (தாலி கட்டுதல்)
thaali.description: The groom ties the sacred necklace around the bride’s neck – the most important ritual of the wedding

reception.title: Wedding Reception
reception.headline: Celebrate With Us at Our Wedding Reception
reception.description: After our ceremonies, we can't wait to keep celebrating with you! Join us for an evening filled with good food, heartfelt speeches, our first dance as a married couple, and lots of dancing.
reception.description2: It will be our first night as husband and wife, and we want to share every moment of it with you – our family and friends who mean the world to us!

arrival.title: Guest Arrival
arrival.description: Arrive and get settled. Enjoy welcome drinks as we prepare for the evening.

cocktail.title: Cocktail Hour
cocktail.description: Mingle with other guests and enjoy appetizers and refreshments.

entrance.title: Grand Entrance
entrance.description: The newlyweds make their grand entrance into the reception hall.

dinner.title: Dinner Service
dinner.description: A delicious multi-course meal featuring both Western and Indian cuisine.

speeches.title: Speeches & Toasts
speeches.description: Heartfelt speeches from family and friends, followed by toasts to the newlyweds.

firstDance.title: First Dance
firstDance.description: The couple's first dance as husband and wife.

party.title: Dance Party
party.description: The dance floor opens! Let's celebrate with music and dancing until late into the night.

story.title: Our Story
story.description: Every love story is beautiful, but ours is our favorite. Here's a glimpse into our journey from strangers to soulmates.

met.title: How We Met
met.description: Through our friends Vithursan and Subi, who brought their colleague circles together, our paths crossed for the first time. What started as a casual meeting among colleagues quickly evolved into exciting conversations and a special connection.

firstMeet.title: Our First Meeting
firstMeet.description:
Sivani was looking for someone to motivate her to run and wrote: 'If only I had someone to run with me, I would be much more motivated!'
Rushel didn't quite catch the hint at first and instead suggested various other running partners to her 😅.
After several attempts, the hint was finally understood – and so we took our first walk together in Eschenbach. For the first time, we did something completely alone – and noticed how wonderful it felt.

firstDate.title: How We Got Together
firstDate.description:
On a beautiful day in March, we met at Seerose in Pfäffikon for a date. Between conversations, laughter, and the view of the lake, we both realized that we had truly found each other.
On that day, we decided to make it official – and two friends became a couple. 💞

families.title: Meeting the Families
families.description:
In July 2024, the time had come – we officially introduced ourselves to our parents for the first time.
With a little excitement, but much joy, our families met.
It quickly became clear: They also got along wonderfully – and welcomed us both with open arms and warm hearts. ❤️

proposal.title: Our Nichayathartham
proposal.description:
In November 2024, we celebrated our Tamil cultural Nichayathartham.
A day full of joy, tradition, family, and love.
With this special moment, a new chapter began for us – the path to our life together. 💍✨

engagement.title: The Proposal
engagement.description:
In Nice, with a beautiful view and an unforgettable moment, Rushel got down on one knee before Sivani in July 2025.
With a pounding heart and a smile full of love, he asked the one question that changes everything.
And with her 'Yes,' our forever together began. 💖🌅💍

wedding.title: Our Wedding
wedding.description:
In May 2026, we will tie the knot in a beautiful ceremony 💞
We can hardly wait to celebrate this special day with all our loved ones – full of joy, emotions, and unforgettable moments.
A new chapter begins – forever us. 💍✨

cultures.title: A Union of Religions
cultures.description1: We are both proud to be of Tamil heritage and share the same beautiful culture. What makes us special is the union of our different faiths – Christian and Hindu.
cultures.description2: Our wedding will be a celebration of this religious union, honoring both Christian and Hindu traditions. We invite you to join us in this joyous celebration of love, family, and spiritual harmony.

gifts.title: Wedding Gifts
gifts.description: Your presence at our wedding is the greatest gift of all. However, if you wish to honor us with a gift, we have created a registry for your convenience.

note.title: A Note About Gifts
note.description: We're truly honored that you will be celebrating our special day with us. Your presence is what matters most, and we're grateful for your love and support. If you'd like to give a gift, we hope our registry provides some helpful guidance.

gallery.title: Photo Gallery
gallery.description: Upload your photos directly on our wedding day! Capture the best moments from your perspective and help us create a guest photo album together – so we can look back on our special day through your eyes.

form.name: Full Name
form.dietaryPlaceholder: Any food allergies or preferences we should know about?
form.messagePlaceholder: Share your wishes or any message for the couple...

thankYou.title: Thank You!
thankYou.message: We've received your RSVP and can't wait to celebrate with you!

guestbook.title: Guestbook

form.name: Your Name

guestbook.empty: No messages yet. Be the first to leave a message!

accommodations.title: Accommodations
accommodations.description: We've compiled a list of recommended accommodations for our out-of-town guests. These options offer various price points and proximities to our ceremony venues.

transportationTips.title: Transportation Tips
tips: We recommend renting a car as the venues are in different locations.
Swiss public transportation is excellent but may require multiple connections.
Taxis and ride-sharing services are available but can be expensive for longer distances.
We will arrange shuttle service between key hotels and venues on ceremony days.

help.title: Need Additional Help?
help.description: If you need more information about accommodations or have specific requirements, please don't hesitate to contact us.
help.description2: We're happy to help you find the perfect place to stay during our wedding celebrations.

accommodations.noResults: No accommodations match your current filters. Please adjust your criteria.
